channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court invalidates most of Trump's tariffs
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday invalidated most of President Donald Trump's tariffs, a cornerstone of his economic policy in his second term.

item.title: WATCH: Couple recreates curling event inside their home
item.description: An Arkansas couple used mops and a Roomba vacuum cleaner to bring their love of curling inside their own home and go for the gold.

item.title: New data shows economic growth slowed at end of 2025
item.description: The latest Gross Domestic Product report showed a slowdown in growth at the end of 2025. MarketWatch reporter Joy Wiltermuth has more.

item.title: Parents of 764 victim file wrongful death lawsuit against Discord
item.description: The parents of a teen who was allegedly pushed to take his own life by a member of the online extremist network â764â have filed a wrongful death laws...

item.title: Poland withdraws from treaty banning antipersonnel mines
item.description: Poland has officially left the Ottawa Convention, which bans the use of antipersonnel mines

item.title: Supreme Court ruling against Trump tariffs will offer relief, businesses say
item.description: Businesses could be owed nearly $150 billion in refunds after the Supreme Court struck down tariffs imposed under the International Emergency Economic...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trumpâs sweeping tariffs, upending central plank of economic agenda
item.description: The Supreme Court has struck down President Donald Trumpâs far-reaching global tariffs, handing him a significant loss on an issue crucial to his econ...

item.title: Supreme Court strikes down most of Trump's tariffs in major defeat
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday ruled President Trump does not have the authority to unilaterally impose sweeping tariffs under a federal emergency powers...

item.title: Crews hope to resume recovery of 8 bodies from California avalanche after days of dangerous weather
Kelly Pannek on stunning U.S. women's hockey win at Winter Olympics
item.description: Kelly Pannek, a member of the U.S. women's hockey team, is celebrating a gold medal win after a stunning match against Canada at the 2026 Winter Olymp...

item.title: Amex laments Epstein ties as files reveal hundreds of travel bookings
item.description: American Express tells CBS News it regrets having had Jeffrey Epstein as a client, as files reveal he used the company to book travel for multiple wom...

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: Israeli settlers kill 19-year-old Palestinian American, officials and witnesses say
